Our core idea is to bridge flow estimation with geometric reasoning by leveraging the guidance from foundation depth models. To this end, we first develop a Hybrid Flow Network that produces geometry-aware correspondences, enabling consistent depth and pose inference across diverse keyframes. To enforce global consistency, we propose a Bi-Consistent Bundle Adjustment Layer that jointly optimizes keyframe pose and depth under multi-view constraints. Furthermore, we introduce a Reliability-Aware Refinement mechanism that dynamically adapts the flow update process by distinguishing between reliable and uncertain regions, forming a closed feedback loop between matching and optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FoundationSLAM achieves superior trajectory accuracy and dense reconstruction quality across multiple challenging datasets, while running in real-time at 18 FPS, demonstrating strong generalization to various scenarios and practical applicability of our method.
tldr: FoundationSLAM is a learning-based dense SLAM system that leverages foundation depth models to improve geometric consistency and achieve accurate, real-time tracking and mapping.
tldr_zh: FoundationSLAM 是一种基于学习的密集 SLAM 系统，它利用基础深度模型来提高几何一致性，并实现准确、实时的跟踪和映射。
summary_zh: 我们提出了FoundationSLAM，一种基于学习的单目稠密SLAM系统，旨在解决先前基于光流的方法中缺乏几何一致性的问题，从而实现精确和鲁棒的跟踪和建图。 我们的核心思想是通过利用基础深度模型的指导，将光流估计与几何推理相结合。 为此，我们首先开发了一个混合光流网络，该网络产生具有几何感知的对应关系，从而能够跨不同的关键帧进行一致的深度和姿态推断。 为了加强全局一致性，我们提出了一种双向一致性集束调整层，该层在多视点约束下联合优化关键帧的姿态和深度。 此外，我们引入了一种可靠性感知细化机制，通过区分可靠和不确定区域来动态调整光流更新过程，从而在匹配和优化之间形成闭环反馈。 大量实验表明，FoundationSLAM在多个具有挑战性的数据集上实现了卓越的轨迹精度和稠密重建质量，同时以 18 FPS 的实时速度运行，展示了我们方法在各种场景中的强大泛化能力和实际应用性。

title: MoniRefer: A Real-world Large-scale Multi-modal Dataset based on Roadside Infrastructure for 3D Visual Grounding
summary: 3D visual grounding aims to localize the object in 3D point cloud scenes that semantically corresponds to given natural language sentences. It is very critical for roadside infrastructure system to interpret natural languages and localize relevant target objects in complex traffic environments. However, most existing datasets and approaches for 3D visual grounding focus on the indoor and outdoor driving scenes, outdoor monitoring scenarios remain unexplored due to scarcity of paired point cloud-text data captured by roadside infrastructure sensors. In this paper, we introduce a novel task of 3D Visual Grounding for Outdoor Monitoring Scenarios, which enables infrastructure-level understanding of traffic scenes beyond the ego-vehicle perspective. To support this task, we construct MoniRefer, the first real-world large-scale multi-modal dataset for roadside-level 3D visual grounding. The dataset consists of about 136,018 objects with 411,128 natural language expressions collected from multiple complex traffic intersections in the real-world environments. To ensure the quality and accuracy of the dataset, we manually verified all linguistic descriptions and 3D labels for objects. Additionally, we also propose a new end-to-end method, named Moni3DVG, which utilizes the rich appearance information provided by images and geometry and optical information from point cloud for multi-modal feature learning and 3D object localization. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the proposed benchmarks demonstrate the superiority and effectiveness of our method. Our dataset and code will be released.
tldr: The paper introduces MoniRefer, a novel large-scale multi-modal dataset for 3D visual grounding in roadside monitoring scenarios, and proposes a new end-to-end method, Moni3DVG, for 3D object localization.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍MoniRefer，一个用于路边监控场景中3D视觉基础的新型大规模多模态数据集，并提出了一种新的端到端方法Moni3DVG，用于3D对象定位。
summary_zh: 3D视觉定位旨在在3D点云场景中定位与给定自然语言句子在语义上对应的对象。对于路侧基础设施系统解读自然语言并定位复杂交通环境中的相关目标对象至关重要。然而，现有的3D视觉定位数据集和方法大多专注于室内和室外驾驶场景，由于路侧基础设施传感器捕获的配对点云-文本数据的稀缺性，室外监控场景仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的任务：室外监控场景下的3D视觉定位，使得基础设施层面能够理解超越自车视角的交通场景。为了支持这项任务，我们构建了MoniRefer，这是第一个用于路侧级别3D视觉定位的真实世界大型多模态数据集。该数据集包含约136,018个对象，以及从真实世界环境中多个复杂交通路口收集的411,128个自然语言表达式。为了确保数据集的质量和准确性，我们对所有语言描述和对象的3D标签进行了人工验证。此外，我们还提出了一种新的端到端方法，名为Moni3DVG，该方法利用图像提供的丰富外观信息以及点云提供的几何和光学信息进行多模态特征学习和3D目标定位。在所提出的基准上进行的大量实验和消融研究表明了我们方法的优越性和有效性。我们的数据集和代码将被发布。

title: Discovering Coordinated Joint Options via Inter-Agent Relative Dynamics
summary: Temporally extended actions improve the ability to explore and plan in single-agent settings. In multi-agent settings, the exponential growth of the joint state space with the number of agents makes coordinated behaviours even more valuable. Yet, this same exponential growth renders the design of multi-agent options particularly challenging. Existing multi-agent option discovery methods often sacrifice coordination by producing loosely coupled or fully independent behaviours. Toward addressing these limitations, we describe a novel approach for multi-agent option discovery. Specifically, we propose a joint-state abstraction that compresses the state space while preserving the information necessary to discover strongly coordinated behaviours. Our approach builds on the inductive bias that synchronisation over agent states provides a natural foundation for coordination in the absence of explicit objectives. We first approximate a fictitious state of maximal alignment with the team, the \textit{Fermat} state, and use it to define a measure of \textit{spreadness}, capturing team-level misalignment on each individual state dimension. Building on this representation, we then employ a neural graph Laplacian estimator to derive options that capture state synchronisation patterns between agents. We evaluate the resulting options across multiple scenarios in two multi-agent domains, showing that they yield stronger downstream coordination capabilities compared to alternative option discovery methods.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel multi-agent option discovery method that uses a joint-state abstraction based on agent synchronization for discovering coordinated behaviors, leading to improved downstream coordination capabilities compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的多智能体选项发现方法，该方法使用基于智能体同步的联合状态抽象来发现协调行为，与现有方法相比，能够提高下游协调能力。
summary_zh: 时间扩展动作提高了在单智能体环境中探索和规划的能力。在多智能体环境中，联合状态空间随着智能体数量的指数增长使得协调行为更具价值。然而，同样的指数增长使得多智能体选项的设计极具挑战性。现有的多智能体选项发现方法通常通过产生松散耦合或完全独立的行为来牺牲协调性。为了解决这些局限性，我们描述了一种新颖的多智能体选项发现方法。具体来说，我们提出了一种联合状态抽象，它在压缩状态空间的同时，保留了发现强协调行为所需的信息。我们的方法建立在这样一种归纳偏置之上，即在缺乏明确目标的情况下，智能体状态同步为协调提供了一个自然的基石。我们首先近似一个与团队最佳对齐的虚构状态，即\textit{Fermat}状态，并利用它来定义一个\textit{分散度}度量，用于捕捉每个个体状态维度上的团队级不一致性。基于这种表示，我们然后使用神经图拉普拉斯算子估计器来导出捕捉智能体之间状态同步模式的选项。我们在两个多智能体领域的多个场景中评估了生成的选项，表明与替代选项发现方法相比，它们产生了更强的下游协调能力。

title: Sparse Offline Reinforcement Learning with Corruption Robustness
summary: We investigate robustness to strong data corruption in offline sparse reinforcement learning (RL). In our setting, an adversary may arbitrarily perturb a fraction of the collected trajectories from a high-dimensional but sparse Markov decision process, and our goal is to estimate a near optimal policy. The main challenge is that, in the high-dimensional regime where the number of samples $N$ is smaller than the feature dimension $d$, exploiting sparsity is essential for obtaining non-vacuous guarantees but has not been systematically studied in offline RL. We analyse the problem under uniform coverage and sparse single-concentrability assumptions. While Least Square Value Iteration (LSVI), a standard approach for robust offline RL, performs well under uniform coverage, we show that integrating sparsity into LSVI is unnatural, and its analysis may break down due to overly pessimistic bonuses. To overcome this, we propose actor-critic methods with sparse robust estimator oracles, which avoid the use of pointwise pessimistic bonuses and provide the first non-vacuous guarantees for sparse offline RL under single-policy concentrability coverage. Moreover, we extend our results to the contaminated setting and show that our algorithm remains robust under strong contamination. Our results provide the first non-vacuous guarantees in high-dimensional sparse MDPs with single-policy concentrability coverage and corruption, showing that learning a near-optimal policy remains possible in regimes where traditional robust offline RL techniques may fail.
tldr: This paper presents a robust offline sparse reinforcement learning algorithm capable of handling strong data corruption in high-dimensional sparse MDPs, achieving non-vacuous performance guarantees under single-policy concentrability. They propose an actor-critic approach with sparse robust estimator oracles.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的离线稀疏强化学习算法，能够处理高维稀疏MDP中严重的数据损坏，并在单策略集中度下实现了非平凡的性能保证。 他们提出了一种带有稀疏鲁棒估计器的actor-critic方法。
summary_zh: 我们研究了离线稀疏强化学习（RL）中对强数据损坏的鲁棒性。在我们的设定中，一个对抗者可能会任意扰动来自高维但稀疏马尔可夫决策过程的一小部分收集到的轨迹，而我们的目标是估计一个接近最优的策略。主要的挑战是，在高维情况（即样本数量$N$小于特征维度$d$）下，利用稀疏性对于获得非平凡保证至关重要，但尚未在离线强化学习中进行系统研究。我们在一致覆盖和稀疏单集中性假设下分析了该问题。虽然最小二乘值迭代 (LSVI) 是一种用于鲁棒离线强化学习的标准方法，并且在一致覆盖下表现良好，但我们表明将稀疏性集成到 LSVI 中是不自然的，并且其分析可能会由于过于悲观的奖励而崩溃。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了带有稀疏鲁棒估计器预言机的Actor-Critic方法，该方法避免了使用逐点悲观奖励，并为单策略集中性覆盖下的稀疏离线强化学习提供了第一个非平凡保证。此外，我们将结果扩展到受污染的环境，并表明我们的算法在强污染下仍然保持鲁棒性。我们的结果为具有单策略集中性覆盖和损坏的高维稀疏MDP提供了第一个非平凡保证，表明在传统鲁棒离线强化学习技术可能失败的情况下，学习接近最优的策略仍然是可能的。

title: Adaptive Learning Guided by Bias-Noise-Alignment Diagnostics
summary: Learning systems deployed in nonstationary and safety-critical environments often suffer from instability, slow convergence, or brittle adaptation when learning dynamics evolve over time. While modern optimization, reinforcement learning, and meta-learning methods adapt to gradient statistics, they largely ignore the temporal structure of the error signal itself. This paper proposes a diagnostic-driven adaptive learning framework that explicitly models error evolution through a principled decomposition into bias, capturing persistent drift; noise, capturing stochastic variability; and alignment, capturing repeated directional excitation leading to overshoot. These diagnostics are computed online from lightweight statistics of loss or temporal-difference error trajectories and are independent of model architecture or task domain. We show that the proposed bias-noise-alignment decomposition provides a unifying control backbone for supervised optimization, actor-critic reinforcement learning, and learned optimizers. Building on this framework, we derive diagnostic-driven instantiations including a stabilized supervised optimizer, a diagnostic-regulated actor-critic scheme, and a diagnostic-conditioned learned optimizer. Under standard smoothness assumptions, we establish bounded effective updates and stability properties for all cases. Representative diagnostic illustrations in actor-critic learning highlight how the proposed signals modulate adaptation in response to temporal-difference error structure. Overall, this work elevates error evolution to a first-class object in adaptive learning and provides an interpretable, lightweight foundation for reliable learning in dynamic environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a diagnostic-driven adaptive learning framework that models error evolution by decomposing it into bias, noise, and alignment, providing a unifying control backbone for various learning paradigms and enabling stable adaptation in dynamic environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个由诊断驱动的自适应学习框架，该框架通过将误差演化分解为偏差、噪声和对齐来建模，为各种学习范式提供了一个统一的控制主干，并实现了动态环境中的稳定适应。
summary_zh: 在非平稳和安全攸关环境中部署的学习系统，当学习动力学随时间演化时，常常遭受不稳定、收敛缓慢或脆弱适应性的困扰。虽然现代优化、强化学习和元学习方法适应梯度统计量，但它们在很大程度上忽略了误差信号本身的时间结构。本文提出了一种诊断驱动的自适应学习框架，该框架通过将误差分解为偏差（捕捉持续漂移）、噪声（捕捉随机变异性）和对齐（捕捉导致过冲的重复定向激发）这三个部分，从而显式地建模了误差演化。这些诊断指标通过损失或时序差分误差轨迹的轻量级统计量在线计算，并且独立于模型架构或任务领域。我们证明，所提出的偏差-噪声-对齐分解为监督优化、Actor-Critic强化学习和学习型优化器提供了一个统一的控制骨干。在此框架的基础上，我们推导出诊断驱动的实例化，包括一个稳定的监督优化器、一个诊断调节的Actor-Critic方案和一个诊断条件化的学习型优化器。在标准平滑性假设下，我们为所有情况建立了有界有效更新和稳定性属性。在Actor-Critic学习中的代表性诊断说明强调了所提出的信号如何响应时序差分误差结构来调节适应。总而言之，这项工作将误差演化提升为自适应学习中的一等对象，并为动态环境中的可靠学习提供了一个可解释的、轻量级的基础。

title: Fast and Realistic Automated Scenario Simulations and Reporting for an Autonomous Racing Stack
summary: In this paper, we describe the automated simulation and reporting pipeline implemented for our autonomous racing stack, ur.autopilot. The backbone of the simulation is based on a high-fidelity model of the vehicle interfaced as a Functional Mockup Unit (FMU). The pipeline can execute the software stack and the simulation up to three times faster than real-time, locally or on GitHub for Continuous Integration/- Continuous Delivery (CI/CD). As the most important input of the pipeline, there is a set of running scenarios. Each scenario allows the initialization of the ego vehicle in different initial conditions (position and speed), as well as the initialization of any other configuration of the stack. This functionality is essential to validate efficiently critical modules, like the one responsible for high-speed overtaking maneuvers or localization, which are among the most challenging aspects of autonomous racing. Moreover, we describe how we implemented a fault injection module, capable of introducing sensor delays and perturbations as well as modifying outputs of any node of the stack. Finally, we describe the design of our automated reporting process, aimed at maximizing the effectiveness of the simulation analysis.
tldr: The paper presents a fast, automated simulation and reporting pipeline for an autonomous racing stack, featuring scenario initialization, fault injection, and automated reporting for efficient validation of critical modules.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于自动驾驶赛车软件栈的快速、自动化仿真和报告流水线，其特点包括场景初始化、故障注入和自动报告，可用于高效验证关键模块。
summary_zh: 本文描述了为我们的自动驾驶赛车软件栈 ur.autopilot 实施的自动化仿真和报告流程。仿真的主干基于车辆的高保真模型，该模型以功能样机单元 (FMU) 的形式进行接口连接。该流程可以在本地或在 GitHub 上以持续集成/持续交付 (CI/CD) 的方式，以高达实时速度三倍的速度执行软件栈和仿真。运行场景是该流程最重要的输入。每个场景都允许在不同的初始条件（位置和速度）下初始化自车，以及初始化软件栈的任何其他配置。此功能对于高效验证关键模块至关重要，例如负责高速超车机动或定位的模块，这些是自动驾驶赛车中最具挑战性的方面。此外，我们还描述了如何实施故障注入模块，该模块能够引入传感器延迟和扰动并修改软件栈中任何节点的输出。最后，我们描述了自动化报告流程的设计，旨在最大程度地提高仿真分析的有效性。

title: Semi-Automated Data Annotation in Multisensor Datasets for Autonomous Vehicle Testing
summary: This report presents the design and implementation of a semi-automated data annotation pipeline developed within the DARTS project, whose goal is to create a large-scale, multimodal dataset of driving scenarios recorded in Polish conditions. Manual annotation of such heterogeneous data is both costly and time-consuming. To address this challenge, the proposed solution adopts a human-in-the-loop approach that combines artificial intelligence with human expertise to reduce annotation cost and duration. The system automatically generates initial annotations, enables iterative model retraining, and incorporates data anonymization and domain adaptation techniques. At its core, the tool relies on 3D object detection algorithms to produce preliminary annotations. Overall, the developed tools and methodology result in substantial time savings while ensuring consistent, high-quality annotations across different sensor modalities. The solution directly supports the DARTS project by accelerating the preparation of large annotated dataset in the project's standardized format, strengthening the technological base for autonomous vehicle research in Poland.
tldr: The paper presents a semi-automated data annotation pipeline for multi-sensor autonomous driving datasets, using a human-in-the-loop approach to reduce annotation costs and time, and claims to accelerate dataset preparation using AI-driven tools.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于多传感器自动驾驶数据集的半自动数据标注流程，采用人机协作方法来降低标注成本和时间，并声称使用人工智能驱动的工具来加速数据集的准备。
summary_zh: 本报告介绍了在DARTS项目中开发的半自动化数据标注流水线的设计与实现。该项目的目标是创建一个大规模、多模态的波兰驾驶场景数据集。对如此异构的数据进行手动标注既昂贵又耗时。为了应对这一挑战，提出的解决方案采用了一种人机协作的方法，将人工智能与人类专业知识相结合，以降低标注成本和时间。该系统自动生成初始标注，支持迭代模型重训练，并集成了数据匿名化和领域自适应技术。该工具的核心依赖于3D目标检测算法来生成初步标注。总体而言，所开发的工具和方法显著节省了时间，同时确保了不同传感器模态之间标注的一致性和高质量。该解决方案通过加速项目中标准化格式的大型标注数据集的准备，直接支持DARTS项目，从而加强了波兰自动驾驶汽车研究的技术基础。

title: BatteryAgent: Synergizing Physics-Informed Interpretation with LLM Reasoning for Intelligent Battery Fault Diagnosis
summary: Fault diagnosis of lithium-ion batteries is critical for system safety. While existing deep learning methods exhibit superior detection accuracy, their "black-box" nature hinders interpretability. Furthermore, restricted by binary classification paradigms, they struggle to provide root cause analysis and maintenance recommendations. To address these limitations, this paper proposes BatteryAgent, a hierarchical framework that integrates physical knowledge features with the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). The framework comprises three core modules: (1) A Physical Perception Layer that utilizes 10 mechanism-based features derived from electrochemical principles, balancing dimensionality reduction with physical fidelity; (2) A Detection and Attribution Layer that employs Gradient Boosting Decision Trees and SHAP to quantify feature contributions; and (3) A Reasoning and Diagnosis Layer that leverages an LLM as the agent core. This layer constructs a "numerical-semantic" bridge, combining SHAP attributions with a mechanism knowledge base to generate comprehensive reports containing fault types, root cause analysis, and maintenance suggestions. Experimental results demonstrate that BatteryAgent effectively corrects misclassifications on hard boundary samples, achieving an AUROC of 0.986, which significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the framework extends traditional binary detection to multi-type interpretable diagnosis, offering a new paradigm shift from "passive detection" to "intelligent diagnosis" for battery safety management.
tldr: BatteryAgent is a novel framework enhancing lithium-ion battery fault diagnosis by integrating physics-informed features with LLM reasoning, providing interpretable root cause analysis and maintenance recommendations, outperforming existing methods.
tldr_zh: BatteryAgent 是一种新颖的框架，通过将物理信息特征与LLM推理相结合来增强锂离子电池的故障诊断，提供可解释的根本原因分析和维护建议，并且优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 锂离子电池的故障诊断对于系统安全至关重要。虽然现有的深度学习方法展现出卓越的检测精度，但其“黑盒”特性阻碍了解释性。此外，受限于二元分类范式，它们难以提供根本原因分析和维护建议。为了解决这些局限性，本文提出了一种分层框架BatteryAgent，该框架将物理知识特征与大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力相结合。该框架包含三个核心模块：（1）物理感知层，利用从电化学原理推导出的10个基于机理的特征，在降维和物理保真度之间取得平衡；（2）检测和归因层，采用梯度提升决策树和SHAP来量化特征贡献；（3）推理和诊断层，利用LLM作为Agent核心。该层构建了一个“数值-语义”桥梁，将SHAP归因与机理知识库相结合，生成包含故障类型、根本原因分析和维护建议的综合报告。实验结果表明，BatteryAgent有效地纠正了困难边界样本上的错误分类，实现了0.986的AUROC，显著优于当前最先进的方法。此外，该框架将传统的二元检测扩展到多类型可解释诊断，为电池安全管理提供了一种从“被动检测”到“智能诊断”的新范式转变。

title: 3D Semantic Segmentation for Post-Disaster Assessment
summary: The increasing frequency of natural disasters poses severe threats to human lives and leads to substantial economic losses. While 3D semantic segmentation is crucial for post-disaster assessment, existing deep learning models lack datasets specifically designed for post-disaster environments. To address this gap, we constructed a specialized 3D dataset using unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs)-captured aerial footage of Hurricane Ian (2022) over affected areas, employing Structure-from-Motion (SfM) and Multi-View Stereo (MVS) techniques to reconstruct 3D point clouds. We evaluated the state-of-the-art (SOTA) 3D semantic segmentation models, Fast Point Transformer (FPT), Point Transformer v3 (PTv3), and OA-CNNs on this dataset, exposing significant limitations in existing methods for disaster-stricken regions. These findings underscore the urgent need for advancements in 3D segmentation techniques and the development of specialized 3D benchmark datasets to improve post-disaster scene understanding and response.
tldr: This paper introduces a new 3D semantic segmentation dataset for post-disaster assessment using UAV imagery from Hurricane Ian, highlighting the limitations of existing SOTA models in this domain and calling for specialized methods and benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个新的用于灾后评估的3D语义分割数据集，该数据集使用飓风伊恩的无人机图像，突出了现有SOTA模型在该领域的局限性，并呼吁开发专门的方法和基准。
summary_zh: 自然灾害日益频繁，对人类生命构成严重威胁，并造成巨大的经济损失。虽然3D语义分割对于灾后评估至关重要，但现有的深度学习模型缺乏专门为灾后环境设计的数据集。为了解决这一问题，我们使用无人机（UAV）捕获的飓风伊恩（2022）灾区航拍影像，构建了一个专门的3D数据集，并采用运动重建（SfM）和多视点立体视觉（MVS）技术重建3D点云。我们在此数据集上评估了最先进的（SOTA）3D语义分割模型，即Fast Point Transformer（FPT）、Point Transformer v3（PTv3）和OA-CNNs，揭示了现有方法在灾区应用中的显著局限性。这些发现强调了迫切需要改进3D分割技术，并开发专门的3D基准数据集，以提高灾后场景理解和响应能力。

title: Robust Bayesian Dynamic Programming for On-policy Risk-sensitive Reinforcement Learning
summary: We propose a novel framework for risk-sensitive reinforcement learning (RSRL) that incorporates robustness against transition uncertainty. We define two distinct yet coupled risk measures: an inner risk measure addressing state and cost randomness and an outer risk measure capturing transition dynamics uncertainty. Our framework unifies and generalizes most existing RL frameworks by permitting general coherent risk measures for both inner and outer risk measures. Within this framework, we construct a risk-sensitive robust Markov decision process (RSRMDP), derive its Bellman equation, and provide error analysis under a given posterior distribution. We further develop a Bayesian Dynamic Programming (Bayesian DP) algorithm that alternates between posterior updates and value iteration. The approach employs an estimator for the risk-based Bellman operator that combines Monte Carlo sampling with convex optimization, for which we prove strong consistency guarantees. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the algorithm converges to a near-optimal policy in the training environment and analyze both the sample complexity and the computational complexity under the Dirichlet posterior and CVaR. Finally, we validate our approach through two numerical experiments. The results exhibit excellent convergence properties while providing intuitive demonstrations of its advantages in both risk-sensitivity and robustness. Empirically, we further demonstrate the advantages of the proposed algorithm through an application on option hedging.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel Bayesian Dynamic Programming framework for risk-sensitive reinforcement learning that incorporates robustness against transition uncertainty, offering a generalized approach with strong consistency guarantees and demonstrated empirical advantages in option hedging.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个新颖的贝叶斯动态规划框架，用于风险敏感的强化学习，该框架结合了对转移不确定性的鲁棒性，提供了一种通用的方法，具有很强的相容性保证，并在期权套期保值方面展示了经验优势。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的风险敏感强化学习(RSRL)框架，该框架融入了针对转移不确定性的鲁棒性。我们定义了两种截然不同但又相互耦合的风险度量：一种内部风险度量处理状态和成本的随机性，另一种外部风险度量捕捉转移动态的不确定性。我们的框架通过允许对内部和外部风险度量使用一般的相干风险度量，统一并推广了大多数现有的RL框架。在此框架内，我们构造了一种风险敏感鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程(RSRMDP)，推导了其贝尔曼方程，并在给定的后验分布下提供了误差分析。我们进一步开发了一种贝叶斯动态规划(Bayesian DP)算法，该算法在后验更新和值迭代之间交替进行。该方法采用一种基于蒙特卡洛采样与凸优化的风险贝尔曼算子估计器，并为其证明了强一致性保证。此外，我们证明了该算法在训练环境中收敛到接近最优的策略，并分析了狄利克雷后验和CVaR下的样本复杂度和计算复杂度。最后，我们通过两个数值实验验证了我们的方法。结果显示出优异的收敛特性，同时直观地演示了其在风险敏感性和鲁棒性方面的优势。在经验上，我们进一步通过期权对冲应用证明了所提出算法的优势。

title: Hierarchical Deformation Planning and Neural Tracking for DLOs in Constrained Environments
summary: Deformable linear objects (DLOs) manipulation presents significant challenges due to DLOs' inherent high-dimensional state space and complex deformation dynamics. The wide-populated obstacles in realistic workspaces further complicate DLO manipulation, necessitating efficient deformation planning and robust deformation tracking. In this work, we propose a novel framework for DLO manipulation in constrained environments. This framework combines hierarchical deformation planning with neural tracking, ensuring reliable performance in both global deformation synthesis and local deformation tracking. Specifically, the deformation planner begins by generating a spatial path set that inherently satisfies the homotopic constraints associated with DLO keypoint paths. Next, a path-set-guided optimization method is applied to synthesize an optimal temporal deformation sequence for the DLO. In manipulation execution, a neural model predictive control approach, leveraging a data-driven deformation model, is designed to accurately track the planned DLO deformation sequence. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is validated in extensive constrained DLO manipulation tasks.
tldr: This paper presents a hierarchical planning and neural tracking framework for manipulating deformable linear objects (DLOs) in constrained environments, combining path-set-guided optimization with neural model predictive control.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于在约束环境中操作可变形线性对象（DLO）的分层规划和神经跟踪框架，该框架结合了路径集引导的优化与神经模型预测控制。
summary_zh: 形变线性物体(DLO)操作由于DLO固有的高维状态空间和复杂的形变动力学，带来了巨大的挑战。现实工作空间中广泛存在的障碍物进一步复杂化了DLO操作，需要高效的形变规划和鲁棒的形变跟踪。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的约束环境下DLO操作框架。该框架结合了分层形变规划和神经跟踪，确保了全局形变合成和局部形变跟踪中的可靠性能。具体来说，形变规划器首先生成一个空间路径集，该路径集固有地满足与DLO关键点路径相关的同伦约束。接下来，应用一种路径集引导的优化方法来合成DLO的最佳时间形变序列。在操作执行中，设计了一种利用数据驱动形变模型的神经模型预测控制方法，以精确跟踪规划的DLO形变序列。所提出的框架的有效性在广泛的约束DLO操作任务中得到了验证。

title: CREPES-X: Hierarchical Bearing-Distance-Inertial Direct Cooperative Relative Pose Estimation System
summary: Relative localization is critical for cooperation in autonomous multi-robot systems. Existing approaches either rely on shared environmental features or inertial assumptions or suffer from non-line-of-sight degradation and outliers in complex environments. Robust and efficient fusion of inter-robot measurements such as bearings, distances, and inertials for tens of robots remains challenging. We present CREPES-X (Cooperative RElative Pose Estimation System with multiple eXtended features), a hierarchical relative localization framework that enhances speed, accuracy, and robustness under challenging conditions, without requiring any global information. CREPES-X starts with a compact hardware design: InfraRed (IR) LEDs, an IR camera, an ultra-wideband module, and an IMU housed in a cube no larger than 6cm on each side. Then CREPES-X implements a two-stage hierarchical estimator to meet different requirements, considering speed, accuracy, and robustness. First, we propose a single-frame relative estimator that provides instant relative poses for multi-robot setups through a closed-form solution and robust bearing outlier rejection. Then a multi-frame relative estimator is designed to offer accurate and robust relative states by exploring IMU pre-integration via robocentric relative kinematics with loosely- and tightly-coupled optimization. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments validate the effectiveness of CREPES-X, showing robustness to up to 90% bearing outliers, proving resilience in challenging conditions, and achieving RMSE of 0.073m and 1.817° in real-world datasets.
tldr: CREPES-X is a hierarchical relative pose estimation system for multi-robot systems using bearing-distance-inertial measurements, achieving robustness and accuracy in challenging conditions.
tldr_zh: CREPES-X 是一种分层相对位姿估计系统，用于多机器人系统，它使用方位角-距离-惯性测量，在具有挑战性的条件下实现了鲁棒性和准确性。
summary_zh: 相对定位对于自主多机器人系统的协作至关重要。现有方法要么依赖于共享的环境特征或惯性假设，要么在复杂环境中遭受非视距退化和离群值的影响。对于数十个机器人，可靠且高效地融合机器人间测量值（如方位角、距离和惯性测量）仍然具有挑战性。我们提出 CREPES-X (基于多eXtended特征的协同相对位姿估计系统)，一种分层相对定位框架，可在具有挑战性的条件下提高速度、准确性和鲁棒性，而无需任何全局信息。 CREPES-X 从紧凑的硬件设计开始：红外 (IR) LED、红外相机、超宽带模块和一个 IMU，封装在一个每边不超过 6 厘米的立方体内。然后，CREPES-X 实现了两阶段分层估计器，以满足速度、准确性和鲁棒性的不同要求。首先，我们提出了一种单帧相对估计器，通过闭式解和鲁棒的方位角离群值剔除，为多机器人设置提供即时相对位姿。然后，设计了一种多帧相对估计器，通过利用基于机器人坐标系的相对运动学和松耦合/紧耦合优化进行 IMU 预积分，以提供准确和鲁棒的相对状态。大量的模拟和真实世界实验验证了 CREPES-X 的有效性，表明其对高达 90% 方位角离群值的鲁棒性，证明了其在具有挑战性条件下表现出的弹性，并在真实世界数据集中实现了 0.073 米和 1.817 度的 RMSE。

title: Energy-Aware Bayesian Control Barrier Functions for Physics-Informed Gaussian Process Dynamics
summary: We study safe control for dynamical systems whose continuous-time dynamics are learned with Gaussian processes (GPs), focusing on mechanical and port-Hamiltonian systems where safety is naturally expressed via energy constraints. The availability of a GP Hamiltonian posterior naturally raises the question of how to systematically exploit this structure to design an energy-aware control barrier function with high-probability safety guarantees. We address this problem by developing a Bayesian-CBF framework and instantiating it with energy-aware Bayesian-CBFs (EB-CBFs) that construct conservative energy-based barriers directly from the Hamiltonian and vector-field posteriors, yielding safety filters that minimally modify a nominal controller while providing probabilistic energy safety guarantees. Numerical simulations on a mass-spring system demonstrate that the proposed EB-CBFs achieve high-probability safety under noisy sampled GP-learned dynamics.
tldr: This paper introduces Energy-Aware Bayesian Control Barrier Functions (EB-CBFs) for safe control of dynamical systems with Gaussian Process learned dynamics, focusing on energy constraints in mechanical and port-Hamiltonian systems. It provides probabilistic safety guarantees with minimal intervention on the nominal controller.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种能量感知贝叶斯控制屏障函数（EB-CBF），用于具有高斯过程学习动力学的动力系统的安全控制，重点关注机械和端口哈密顿系统中的能量约束。它通过对标称控制器进行最小干预来提供概率安全保证。
summary_zh: 我们研究动力系统的安全控制，该动力系统的连续时间动态由高斯过程（GP）学习得到，重点关注机械和端口-哈密顿系统，其中安全性自然地通过能量约束表达。GP哈密顿量后验的存在自然引发了一个问题，即如何系统地利用这种结构来设计具有高概率安全保证的能量感知控制障碍函数。我们通过开发贝叶斯-CBF框架并使用能量感知贝叶斯-CBF（EB-CBF）来实例化它，从而解决这个问题。EB-CBF直接从哈密顿量和矢量场后验构建保守的基于能量的障碍，从而产生安全滤波器，该滤波器在提供概率性能量安全保证的同时，以最小的幅度修改标称控制器。对质量-弹簧系统的数值模拟表明，所提出的EB-CBF在噪声采样的GP学习动态下实现了高概率安全性。

title: BandiK: Efficient Multi-Task Decomposition Using a Multi-Bandit Framework
summary:
The challenge of effectively transferring knowledge across multiple tasks is of critical importance and is also present in downstream tasks with foundation models. However, the nature of transfer, its transitive-intransitive nature, is still an open problem, and negative transfer remains a significant obstacle. Selection of beneficial auxiliary task sets in multi-task learning is frequently hindered by the high computational cost of their evaluation, the high number of plausible candidate auxiliary sets, and the varying complexity of selection across target tasks.
  To address these constraints, we introduce BandiK, a novel three-stage multi-task auxiliary task subset selection method using multi-bandits, where each arm pull evaluates candidate auxiliary sets by training and testing a multiple output neural network on a single random train-test dataset split. Firstly, BandiK estimates the pairwise transfers between tasks, which helps in identifying which tasks are likely to benefit from joint learning. In the second stage, it constructs a linear number of candidate sets of auxiliary tasks (in the number of all tasks) for each target task based on the initial estimations, significantly reducing the exponential number of potential auxiliary task sets. Thirdly, it employs a Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) framework for each task, where the arms correspond to the performance of candidate auxiliary sets realized as multiple output neural networks over train-test data set splits. To enhance efficiency, BandiK integrates these individual task-specific MABs into a multi-bandit structure. The proposed multi-bandit solution exploits that the same neural network realizes multiple arms of different individual bandits corresponding to a given candidate set. This semi-overlapping arm property defines a novel multi-bandit cost/reward structure utilized in BandiK.
tldr: This paper introduces BandiK, a multi-task learning method that efficiently selects beneficial auxiliary tasks using a multi-bandit framework to mitigate negative transfer, which is relevant in foundation models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍 BandiK，一种多任务学习方法，它使用多臂老虎机框架有效地选择有益的辅助任务以减轻负迁移，这与基础模型相关。
summary_zh:
有效跨多任务迁移知识是一个至关重要的挑战，在下游任务中使用基座模型时同样存在。然而，迁移的本质，其传递性和非传递性，仍然是一个开放的问题，负迁移仍然是一个重要的障碍。在多任务学习中选择有益的辅助任务集常常受到以下因素的阻碍：评估它们的高计算成本、大量合理的候选辅助集以及不同目标任务之间选择的复杂性差异。

为了解决这些限制，我们引入了BandiK，一种新颖的三阶段多任务辅助任务子集选择方法，它使用多臂老虎机。其中，每次拉动臂时，都会通过在单个随机训练-测试数据集分割上训练和测试一个多输出神经网络来评估候选辅助集。首先，BandiK估计任务之间的成对迁移，这有助于识别哪些任务可能受益于联合学习。在第二阶段，它基于初始估计，为每个目标任务构建线性数量的辅助任务候选集（数量为所有任务的数量级），从而显著减少了潜在辅助任务集指数级的数量。第三，它为每个任务采用多臂老虎机（MAB）框架，其中每个臂对应于候选辅助集实现的性能，候选辅助集被实现为训练-测试数据集分割上的多输出神经网络。为了提高效率，BandiK将这些单独的特定于任务的MAB集成到一个多臂老虎机结构中。提议的多臂老虎机解决方案利用了这样一个事实：同一个神经网络实现了对应于给定候选集的不同个体老虎机的多个臂。这种半重叠臂的特性定义了一种新颖的多臂老虎机成本/奖励结构，该结构被BandiK所利用。

title: Semi-Supervised Diversity-Aware Domain Adaptation for 3D Object detection
summary: 3D object detectors are fundamental components of perception systems in autonomous vehicles. While these detectors achieve remarkable performance on standard autonomous driving benchmarks, they often struggle to generalize across different domains - for instance, a model trained in the U.S. may perform poorly in regions like Asia or Europe. This paper presents a novel lidar domain adaptation method based on neuron activation patterns, demonstrating that state-of-the-art performance can be achieved by annotating only a small, representative, and diverse subset of samples from the target domain if they are correctly selected. The proposed approach requires very small annotation budget and, when combined with post-training techniques inspired by continual learning prevent weight drift from the original model. Empirical evaluation shows that the proposed domain adaptation approach outperforms both linear probing and state-of-the-art domain adaptation techniques.
tldr: This paper proposes a semi-supervised, diversity-aware domain adaptation method for 3D object detection using LiDAR data, showing significant improvement over existing techniques with a small annotation budget.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR数据的半监督、多样性感知的3D目标检测领域自适应方法，证明了在少量标注预算下，该方法比现有技术有显著的改进。
summary_zh: 3D目标检测器是自动驾驶车辆感知系统的基础组件。尽管这些检测器在标准自动驾驶基准测试中表现出色，但它们通常难以在不同领域泛化——例如，在美国训练的模型可能在亚洲或欧洲等地区表现不佳。本文提出了一种基于神经元激活模式的新型激光雷达域适应方法，证明了如果正确选择目标域中的一小部分、具有代表性和多样性的样本进行标注，就可以实现最先进的性能。所提出的方法只需要非常少的标注预算，并且与受持续学习启发的后训练技术相结合，可以防止原始模型的权重漂移。实验评估表明，所提出的域适应方法优于线性探测和最先进的域适应技术。

title: UniC-Lift: Unified 3D Instance Segmentation via Contrastive Learning
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have advanced novel-view synthesis. Recent methods extend multi-view 2D segmentation to 3D, enabling instance/semantic segmentation for better scene understanding. A key challenge is the inconsistency of 2D instance labels across views, leading to poor 3D predictions. Existing methods use a two-stage approach in which some rely on contrastive learning with hyperparameter-sensitive clustering, while others preprocess labels for consistency. We propose a unified framework that merges these steps, reducing training time and improving performance by introducing a learnable feature embedding for segmentation in Gaussian primitives. This embedding is then efficiently decoded into instance labels through a novel "Embedding-to-Label" process, effectively integrating the optimization. While this unified framework offers substantial benefits, we observed artifacts at the object boundaries. To address the object boundary issues, we propose hard-mining samples along these boundaries. However, directly applying hard mining to the feature embeddings proved unstable. Therefore, we apply a linear layer to the rasterized feature embeddings before calculating the triplet loss, which stabilizes training and significantly improves performance. Our method outperforms baselines qualitatively and quantitatively on the ScanNet, Replica3D, and Messy-Rooms datasets.
tldr: This paper introduces UniC-Lift, a unified framework for 3D instance segmentation from novel view synthesis using 3D Gaussian Splatting, addressing label inconsistencies and improving performance through a learnable embedding and hard-mining strategy.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了UniC-Lift，一个用于从新视角合成中进行3D实例分割的统一框架，它使用3D高斯溅射来解决标签不一致性问题，并通过可学习的嵌入和硬挖掘策略来提高性能。
summary_zh: 3D高斯溅射 (3DGS) 和神经辐射场 (NeRF) 推动了新视角合成的发展。最近的方法将多视角2D分割扩展到3D，从而能够进行实例/语义分割，以实现更好的场景理解。一个关键的挑战是2D实例标签在不同视角下的一致性问题，这会导致较差的3D预测结果。现有的方法采用两阶段方法，其中一些依赖于具有超参数敏感聚类的对比学习，而另一些则预处理标签以保持一致性。我们提出了一个统一的框架，该框架合并了这些步骤，通过引入用于高斯基元分割的可学习特征嵌入，从而减少了训练时间并提高了性能。然后，通过一种新颖的“嵌入到标签”过程，将该嵌入有效地解码为实例标签，从而有效地整合了优化过程。虽然这个统一的框架提供了显著的优势，但我们观察到对象边界处存在伪影。为了解决对象边界问题，我们提出了沿着这些边界进行硬样本挖掘。然而，直接将硬挖掘应用于特征嵌入被证明是不稳定的。因此，我们在计算三元组损失之前，对光栅化的特征嵌入应用一个线性层，从而稳定了训练并显著提高了性能。我们的方法在 ScanNet、Replica3D 和 Messy-Rooms 数据集上，在定性和定量方面都优于基线方法。

title: AI-Driven Evaluation of Surgical Skill via Action Recognition
summary: The development of effective training and evaluation strategies is critical. Conventional methods for assessing surgical proficiency typically rely on expert supervision, either through onsite observation or retrospective analysis of recorded procedures. However, these approaches are inherently subjective, susceptible to inter-rater variability, and require substantial time and effort from expert surgeons. These demands are often impractical in low- and middle-income countries, thereby limiting the scalability and consistency of such methods across training programs. To address these limitations, we propose a novel AI-driven framework for the automated assessment of microanastomosis performance. The system integrates a video transformer architecture based on TimeSformer, improved with hierarchical temporal attention and weighted spatial attention mechanisms, to achieve accurate action recognition within surgical videos. Fine-grained motion features are then extracted using a YOLO-based object detection and tracking method, allowing for detailed analysis of instrument kinematics. Performance is evaluated along five aspects of microanastomosis skill, including overall action execution, motion quality during procedure-critical actions, and general instrument handling. Experimental validation using a dataset of 58 expert-annotated videos demonstrates the effectiveness of the system, achieving 87.7% frame-level accuracy in action segmentation that increased to 93.62% with post-processing, and an average classification accuracy of 76% in replicating expert assessments across all skill aspects. These findings highlight the system's potential to provide objective, consistent, and interpretable feedback, thereby enabling more standardized, data-driven training and evaluation in surgical education.
tldr: This paper presents an AI-driven system for automated surgical skill assessment using video analysis, achieving high accuracy in action recognition and expert assessment replication, potentially enabling standardized surgical training.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的自动化手术技能评估系统，该系统利用视频分析，在动作识别和专家评估复制方面达到了很高的准确率，有望实现标准化手术培训。
summary_zh: 开发有效的培训和评估策略至关重要。评估外科手术熟练程度的传统方法通常依赖于专家监督，或通过现场观察，或通过对已记录手术的回顾性分析。然而，这些方法本质上是主观的，容易受到评分者间差异的影响，并且需要专家外科医生投入大量时间和精力。这些需求在低收入和中等收入国家往往是不切实际的，从而限制了此类方法在不同培训项目中的可扩展性和一致性。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的AI驱动框架，用于自动评估显微血管吻合术的性能。该系统集成了一个基于TimeSformer的视频Transformer架构，并通过分层时间注意力和加权空间注意力机制进行了改进，以实现对手术视频中动作的准确识别。随后，使用基于YOLO的目标检测和跟踪方法提取精细的运动特征，从而可以对器械运动学进行详细分析。性能评估围绕显微血管吻合术技巧的五个方面展开，包括整体动作执行、关键手术动作期间的运动质量以及一般器械操作。使用包含58个专家标注视频的数据集进行的实验验证表明该系统的有效性，在动作分割中实现了87.7%的帧级准确率，经过后处理后提高到93.62%，并且在复制所有技能方面的专家评估时，平均分类准确率达到76%。这些发现突出了该系统提供客观、一致且可解释反馈的潜力，从而在外科教育中实现更标准化、数据驱动的培训和评估。

title: Mobility-Assisted Decentralized Federated Learning: Convergence Analysis and A Data-Driven Approach
summary: Decentralized Federated Learning (DFL) has emerged as a privacy-preserving machine learning paradigm that enables collaborative training among users without relying on a central server. However, its performance often degrades significantly due to limited connectivity and data heterogeneity. As we move toward the next generation of wireless networks, mobility is increasingly embedded in many real-world applications. The user mobility, either natural or induced, enables clients to act as relays or bridges, thus enhancing information flow in sparse networks; however, its impact on DFL has been largely overlooked despite its potential. In this work, we systematically investigate the role of mobility in improving DFL performance. We first establish the convergence of DFL in sparse networks under user mobility and theoretically demonstrate that even random movement of a fraction of users can significantly boost performance. Building upon this insight, we propose a DFL framework that utilizes mobile users with induced mobility patterns, allowing them to exploit the knowledge of data distribution to determine their trajectories to enhance information propagation through the network. Through extensive experiments, we empirically confirm our theoretical findings, validate the superiority of our approach over baselines, and provide a comprehensive analysis of how various network parameters influence DFL performance in mobile networks.
tldr: This paper investigates how user mobility can improve Decentralized Federated Learning (DFL) performance in sparse networks, proposing a mobility-aware DFL framework and demonstrating its effectiveness through theory and experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文研究了用户移动性如何提高稀疏网络中分散式联邦学习 (DFL) 的性能，提出了一种移动性感知 DFL 框架，并通过理论和实验证明了其有效性。
summary_zh: 去中心化联邦学习 (DFL) 作为一种隐私保护的机器学习范式，允许用户之间进行协作训练，而无需依赖中央服务器。 然而，由于有限的连接性和数据异构性，其性能通常会显著下降。 随着我们迈向下一代无线网络，移动性越来越嵌入到许多实际应用中。 用户移动性，无论是自然发生的还是诱导产生的，都使客户端能够充当 relays 或 bridges，从而增强稀疏网络中的信息流； 然而，尽管其潜力巨大，但它对 DFL 的影响在很大程度上被忽视了。 在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了移动性在提高 DFL 性能中的作用。 我们首先在用户移动性下建立了 DFL 在稀疏网络中的收敛性，并在理论上证明，即使是一小部分用户的随机移动也能显著提高性能。 在此基础上，我们提出了一种 DFL 框架，该框架利用具有诱导移动模式的移动用户，使他们能够利用数据分布的知识来确定其轨迹，从而增强网络中的信息传播。 通过大量实验，我们通过实证验证了我们的理论结果，验证了我们方法相对于基线的优越性，并全面分析了各种网络参数如何影响移动网络中的 DFL 性能。

title: CropTrack: A Tracking with Re-Identification Framework for Precision Agriculture
summary: Multiple-object tracking (MOT) in agricultural environments presents major challenges due to repetitive patterns, similar object appearances, sudden illumination changes, and frequent occlusions. Contemporary trackers in this domain rely on the motion of objects rather than appearance for association. Nevertheless, they struggle to maintain object identities when targets undergo frequent and strong occlusions. The high similarity of object appearances makes integrating appearance-based association nontrivial for agricultural scenarios. To solve this problem we propose CropTrack, a novel MOT framework based on the combination of appearance and motion information. CropTrack integrates a reranking-enhanced appearance association, a one-to-many association with appearance-based conflict resolution strategy, and an exponential moving average prototype feature bank to improve appearance-based association. Evaluated on publicly available agricultural MOT datasets, CropTrack demonstrates consistent identity preservation, outperforming traditional motion-based tracking methods. Compared to the state of the art, CropTrack achieves significant gains in identification F1 and association accuracy scores with a lower number of identity switches.
tldr: CropTrack is a novel multi-object tracking framework for agricultural environments that combines appearance and motion information to improve object identity preservation, particularly in challenging scenarios with occlusions and similar object appearances.
tldr_zh: CropTrack 是一种新颖的用于农业环境的多目标跟踪框架，它结合了外观和运动信息，以提高物体身份的保持，尤其是在具有遮挡和相似物体外观的挑战性场景中。
summary_zh: 农业环境中的多目标跟踪(MOT)由于重复性模式、相似的物体外观、突如其来的光照变化和频繁的遮挡而面临重大挑战。该领域现有的跟踪器主要依靠物体的运动而非外观来进行关联。然而，当目标经历频繁且强烈的遮挡时，它们难以维持物体身份。物体高度相似的外观使得在农业场景中整合基于外观的关联变得非常困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出CropTrack，一种基于外观和运动信息相结合的新型MOT框架。CropTrack集成了重排序增强的外观关联、一种基于外观的冲突解决策略的一对多关联，以及一个指数移动平均原型特征库，以改进基于外观的关联。在公开的农业MOT数据集上进行评估后，CropTrack展示了持续的身份保持能力，优于传统的基于运动的跟踪方法。与最先进的方法相比，CropTrack在识别F1值和关联准确率方面取得了显著提升，同时减少了身份切换次数。

title: FAST-IDS: A Fast Two-Stage Intrusion Detection System with Hybrid Compression for Real-Time Threat Detection in Connected and Autonomous Vehicles
summary: We have implemented a multi-stage IDS for CAVs that can be deployed to resourec-constrained environments after hybrid model compression.
tldr: This paper proposes a two-stage intrusion detection system (IDS) with hybrid compression for connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) to enable real-time threat detection in resource-constrained environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于互联和自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的两阶段入侵检测系统（IDS），具有混合压缩功能，可在资源受限的环境中实现实时威胁检测。
summary_zh: 我们实现了一种用于联网自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的多阶段入侵检测系统（IDS），该系统经过混合模型压缩后可以部署到资源受限的环境中。

title: FireRescue: A UAV-Based Dataset and Enhanced YOLO Model for Object Detection in Fire Rescue Scenes
summary: Object detection in fire rescue scenarios is importance for command and decision-making in firefighting operations. However, existing research still suffers from two main limitations. First, current work predominantly focuses on environments such as mountainous or forest areas, while paying insufficient attention to urban rescue scenes, which are more frequent and structurally complex. Second, existing detection systems include a limited number of classes, such as flames and smoke, and lack a comprehensive system covering key targets crucial for command decisions, such as fire trucks and firefighters. To address the above issues, this paper first constructs a new dataset named "FireRescue" for rescue command, which covers multiple rescue scenarios, including urban, mountainous, forest, and water areas, and contains eight key categories such as fire trucks and firefighters, with a total of 15,980 images and 32,000 bounding boxes. Secondly, to tackle the problems of inter-class confusion and missed detection of small targets caused by chaotic scenes, diverse targets, and long-distance shooting, this paper proposes an improved model named FRS-YOLO. On the one hand, the model introduces a plug-and-play multidi-mensional collaborative enhancement attention module, which enhances the discriminative representation of easily confused categories (e.g., fire trucks vs. ordinary trucks) through cross-dimensional feature interaction. On the other hand, it integrates a dynamic feature sampler to strengthen high-response foreground features, thereby mitigating the effects of smoke occlusion and background interference. Experimental results demonstrate that object detection in fire rescue scenarios is highly challenging, and the proposed method effectively improves the detection performance of YOLO series models in this context.
tldr: The paper introduces a new dataset, FireRescue, and an enhanced YOLO model (FRS-YOLO) for object detection in diverse fire rescue scenarios, aiming to improve the detection of key targets like firefighters and fire trucks, particularly in complex urban environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的数据集FireRescue以及一个增强的YOLO模型(FRS-YOLO)，用于在各种消防救援场景中进行目标检测，旨在提高诸如消防员和消防车等关键目标的检测精度，尤其是在复杂的城市环境中。
summary_zh: 火灾救援场景中的目标检测对于消防行动的指挥和决策至关重要。然而，现有研究仍然存在两个主要局限性。首先，目前的工作主要集中在山区或森林等环境中，而对城市救援场景的关注不足，但城市救援场景更为频繁且结构复杂。其次，现有检测系统包含的类别有限，例如火焰和烟雾，缺乏涵盖对指挥决策至关重要的关键目标（如消防车和消防员）的综合系统。为了解决上述问题，本文首先构建了一个名为“FireRescue”的用于救援指挥的新数据集，该数据集涵盖了包括城市、山区、森林和水域等多种救援场景，并包含消防车和消防员等八个关键类别，总计 15,980 张图像和 32,000 个边界框。其次，为了解决由混乱场景、多样化目标和远距离拍摄引起的类别间混淆和小目标漏检等问题，本文提出了一种改进模型，名为 FRS-YOLO。一方面，该模型引入了一个即插即用的多维协同增强注意力模块，通过跨维度的特征交互来增强易混淆类别（例如消防车与普通卡车）的判别性表示。另一方面，它集成了动态特征采样器，以加强高响应前景特征，从而减轻烟雾遮挡和背景干扰的影响。实验结果表明，火灾救援场景中的目标检测具有很高的挑战性，并且所提出的方法有效地提高了YOLO系列模型在此背景下的检测性能。

title: From Trial to Deployment: A SEM Analysis of Traveler Adoptions to Fully Operational Autonomous Taxis
summary: Autonomous taxi services represent a transformative advancement in urban mobility, offering safety, efficiency, and round-the-clock operations. While existing literature has explored user acceptance of autonomous taxis through stated preference experiments and hypothetical scenarios, few studies have investigated actual user behavior based on operational AV services. This study addresses that gap by leveraging survey data from Wuhan, China, where Baidu's Apollo Robotaxi service operates at scale. We design a realistic survey incorporating actual service attributes and collect 336 valid responses from actual users. Using Structural Equation Modeling, we identify six latent psychological constructs, namely Trust \& Policy Support, Cost Sensitivity, Performance, Behavioral Intention, Lifestyle, and Education. Their influences on adoption behavior, measured by the selection frequency of autonomous taxis in ten scenarios, are examined and interpreted. Results show that Cost Sensitivity and Behavioral Intention are the strongest positive predictors of adoption, while other latent constructs play more nuanced roles. The model demonstrates strong goodness-of-fit across multiple indices. Our findings offer empirical evidence to support policymaking, fare design, and public outreach strategies for scaling autonomous taxis deployments in real-world urban settings.
tldr: This paper uses structural equation modeling on survey data from real-world autonomous taxi users in Wuhan, China to identify key psychological factors influencing adoption behavior. The findings offer insights for policy and deployment strategies.
tldr_zh: 本文利用来自中国武汉真实自动驾驶出租车用户的调查数据，使用结构方程模型来识别影响采用行为的关键心理因素。 这些发现为政策和部署策略提供了见解。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶出租车服务代表了城市交通领域的一项变革性进步，提供安全性、高效性和全天候运营。虽然现有文献通过陈述偏好实验和假设情景探索了用户对自动驾驶出租车的接受程度，但鲜有研究基于实际运行的自动驾驶汽车服务来调查用户的真实行为。本研究旨在弥补这一空白，利用来自中国武汉的调查数据，该地百度Apollo Robotaxi服务已大规模运营。我们设计了一份真实的调查问卷，纳入了实际服务属性，并从实际用户中收集了336份有效回复。通过结构方程模型，我们识别了六个潜在的心理结构，即信任与政策支持、成本敏感度、性能、行为意向、生活方式和教育程度。我们考察并解读了这些因素对采用行为（通过十个情景中选择自动驾驶出租车的频率来衡量）的影响。结果表明，成本敏感度和行为意向是采用行为最强的正向预测因子，而其他潜在结构则发挥着更为微妙的作用。该模型在多个指标上表现出良好的拟合度。我们的研究结果为支持在现实城市环境中扩大自动驾驶出租车部署的政策制定、票价设计和公共外展策略提供了经验证据。

title: A study on constraint extraction and exception exclusion in care worker scheduling
summary: Technologies for automatically generating work schedules have been extensively studied; however, in long-term care facilities, the conditions vary between facilities, making it essential to interview the managers who create shift schedules to design facility-specific constraint conditions. The proposed method utilizes constraint templates to extract combinations of various components, such as shift patterns for consecutive days or staff combinations. The templates can extract a variety of constraints by changing the number of days and the number of staff members to focus on and changing the extraction focus to patterns or frequency. In addition, unlike existing constraint extraction techniques, this study incorporates mechanisms to exclude exceptional constraints. The extracted constraints can be employed by a constraint programming solver to create care worker schedules. Experiments demonstrated that our proposed method successfully created schedules that satisfied all hard constraints and reduced the number of violations for soft constraints by circumventing the extraction of exceptional constraints.
tldr: This paper presents a method for extracting and excluding constraints in care worker scheduling using constraint templates, showing improved constraint satisfaction in experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用约束模板提取和排除护理人员排班约束的方法，实验表明该方法能更好地满足约束条件。
summary_zh: 自动生成工作排班表的技术已被广泛研究。然而，在长期护理机构中，各机构的情况差异很大，因此必须与制定轮班表的主管进行访谈，以设计特定于机构的约束条件。本文提出的方法利用约束模板来提取各种组件的组合，例如连续工作日的轮班模式或人员组合。通过改变天数和关注的员工人数，并将提取重点调整为模式或频率，该模板可以提取各种约束。此外，与现有的约束提取技术不同，本研究纳入了排除异常约束的机制。提取的约束可以被约束编程求解器用于创建护理人员排班表。实验表明，我们提出的方法成功创建了满足所有硬约束的排班表，并通过规避异常约束的提取，减少了软约束的违反次数。

title: Towards autonomous time-calibration of large quantum-dot devices: Detection, real-time feedback, and noise spectroscopy
summary: The performance and scalability of semiconductor quantum-dot (QD) qubits are limited by electrostatic drift and charge noise that shift operating points and destabilize qubit parameters. As systems expand to large one- and two-dimensional arrays, manual recalibration becomes impractical, creating a need for autonomous stabilization frameworks. Here, we introduce a method that uses the full network of charge-transition lines in repeatedly acquired double-quantum-dot charge stability diagrams (CSDs) as a multidimensional probe of the local electrostatic environment. By accurately tracking the motion of selected transitions in time, we detect voltage drifts, identify abrupt charge reconfigurations, and apply compensating updates to maintain stable operating conditions. We demonstrate our approach on a 10-QD device, showing robust stabilization and real-time diagnostic access to dot-specific noise processes. The high acquisition rate of radio-frequency reflectometry CSD measurements also enables time-domain noise spectroscopy, allowing the extraction of noise power spectral densities, the identification of two-level fluctuators, and the analysis of spatial noise correlations across the array. From our analysis, we find that the background noise at 100~$μ$\si{\hertz} is dominated by drift with a power law of $1/f^2$, accompanied by a few dominant two-level fluctuators and an average linear correlation length of $(188 \pm 38)$~\si{\nano\meter} in the device. These capabilities form the basis of a scalable, autonomous calibration and characterization module for QD-based quantum processors, providing essential feedback for long-duration, high-fidelity qubit operations.
tldr: The paper introduces an autonomous method for calibrating and characterizing large quantum-dot devices using charge stability diagrams, enabling real-time feedback and noise spectroscopy to improve qubit stability. Specifically, they demonstrate the approach on a 10-QD device, identifying drift, reconfigurations, noise characteristics, and spatial noise correlations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种利用电荷稳定性图自动校准和表征大型量子点器件的方法，实现了实时反馈和噪声谱分析，以提高量子比特的稳定性。具体而言，他们在10-QD器件上演示了该方法，识别了漂移、重构、噪声特性和空间噪声相关性。
summary_zh: 半导体量子点(QD)量子比特的性能和可扩展性受到静电漂移和电荷噪声的限制，这些因素会改变工作点并破坏量子比特参数的稳定性。随着系统扩展到大型一维和二维阵列，手动重新校准变得不切实际，因此需要自主稳定框架。在此，我们介绍一种方法，该方法利用重复获取的双量子点电荷稳定性图（CSD）中完整的电荷跃迁线网络，作为局部静电环境的多维探针。通过精确跟踪选定跃迁随时间的运动，我们检测电压漂移，识别突发的电荷重构，并应用补偿更新以保持稳定的工作条件。我们在一个10-QD器件上演示了我们的方法，展示了强大的稳定性和对特定量子点噪声过程的实时诊断访问。射频反射法CSD测量的高采集速率也支持时域噪声谱分析，允许提取噪声功率谱密度，识别双能级涨落器，以及分析阵列中的空间噪声相关性。从我们的分析中，我们发现100~$μ$\si{\hertz}处的背景噪声主要由漂移主导，其功率律为$1/f^2$，伴随着几个主要的双能级涨落器和一个器件中平均线性相关长度为$(188 \pm 38)$~\si{\nano\meter}。这些能力构成了基于QD的量子处理器的可扩展、自主校准和表征模块的基础，为长时间、高保真度的量子比特操作提供必要的反馈。
